summary: W900 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing W899's three endpoint ExactAt fact leaves and three bounded-homotopy localized-right-adjoint leaves with the existing W856 endpoint-topology-facts provider and W721 localized-right-adjoint provider. This preserves the W899 endpoint-homology-free route without using W726, which would reintroduce W720 endpoint forgetful homology preservation. Product success remains false because the remaining explicit fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W900 bundles W899 endpoint facts and localized-right-adjoint data through W856/W721, but the remaining W900 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

W900 is still a closed-map branch route. The W898 closed-embedding endpoint-homology-free branch remains separately available; no no-argument branch choice or final original-four-task witness has been constructed.

The remaining W900 fields are WPP right-open boundary data, WPP source-pi-zero boundary data, relation-pullback data, target-relation-lift data, target-difference surjectivity, target-codomain compactness, selected-difference closed-map components, mapped explicit cokernel closed-map data, strict preimage object fields, strict preimage map fields, identity and composition coherence, source-image normalization, fixed-target uniqueness obligations, triangulated/source-side data, the W856 endpoint topology facts provider, and the W721 localized-right-adjoint data provider.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the thirty-three W900 closed-map endpoint-localized-adjoint explicit field inputs.

Choose whether the next smallest contract-closing increment should split strict preimage object/map fields, fixed-target uniqueness, source-image normalization, boundary/relation/target data, or another currently supported provider boundary.
Connect a real no-argument route to the original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real rather than merely exposed as fields.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
